title: European Summer Tour Announced
description: Performing at the most prestigious venues across Italy, Germany, and Austria...
body:
Vitaly Yushmanov will embark on an extensive European tour this summer, performing at some of the continent's most prestigious opera houses and concert halls. The tour will take him through Italy, Germany, Austria, and France.

Highlights of the tour include performances of Verdi's 'La Traviata' at the Arena di Verona and a series of liederabends in Vienna and Berlin. This tour marks a significant milestone in Vitaly's international career, bringing his unique artistry to audiences across Europe.
